description: Add deploy verification and auto-notification to bugbot MCP. During poll, check if resolved tickets with fix_commit have been deployed via GitHub Pages, then auto-notify reporters and close tickets. Add bugbot_check_stale tool for detecting stale resolved tickets.
steps: 1. Update internal/model/bug_ticket.go to add FixCommit, FixRepo, DeployedAt, NotifyFailed fields
2. Update internal/repository/bugbot_repo.go to add GetResolvedTicketsAwaitingDeploy, MarkTicketDeployed, MarkTicketNotifyFailed, GetTicketsPendingNotification, update GetUnresolvedTickets filter
3. Update internal/delivery/mcp/bugbot.go to modify handleMarkResolved to accept fix_commit and fix_repo params
4. Update internal/delivery/mcp/bugbot.go to add deploy verification logic in handlePoll
5. Add bugbot_check_stale tool to detect tickets resolved >7 days without deploy
acceptance_criteria: BugTicket model has FixCommit, FixRepo, DeployedAt, NotifyFailed fields
GetUnresolvedTickets includes resolved and deployed status (everything not closed)
handleMarkResolved accepts optional fix_commit and fix_repo parameters
handlePoll checks GitHub Pages for deploy verification of resolved tickets
Deployed tickets get auto-notification sent to reporter via Telegram
bugbot_check_stale tool returns tickets resolved >7 days without deploy
